version_pin_rationale: libseat 0.6.4-1 is the jammy universe release (the .deb is built from the seatd source package which also ships the seatd daemon — NOT planted by DE-H1 because DE0-S already selected systemd-logind as the seat manager). wlroots links libseat.so.1 at compile time and probes for logind via the system DBus first (which DE0-D provides), then falls back to a seatd socket. Without libseat.so.1 wlroots can't open /dev/dri/card0 with the right ACL inheritance and sway emits 'failed to open DRM node'. NOTE: the .deb ships ONLY libseat.so.1 (no separate .so.X.Y.Z file); the .so.1 IS the file. No soname_link needed (same shape as libwlroots10).
